description: RPA Replay capability pack manifest binding for Pack Runtime route gates, frontend sync, dry-run replay planning, Browser Intent / ActionTracer executor handoff planning, evidence export, and lightweight SDK import discovery.
principles: Expose RPA trace storage, recording sessions, dry-run replay plans, executor handoff plans, and evidence export as an optional Pack Runtime capability instead of a hard-coded main-shell feature.
Keep RPA method/path gates, frontend menu/route sync, and SDK import metadata in the pack manifest.
Let external projects import yunque-client/rpa-replay only when the RPA Replay pack is installed and enabled.
